programmes.show_description: A Date With Death. A padlocked suitcase is discovered in the Kent countryside. The body of a woman within tells a story of someone new to the country searching for love. S1, Ep5
Far From Home. When a young woman goes missing, her sister hopes that police will bring her home. Instead, they find her body crammed inside a suitcase, buried in a six-foot grave. S1, Ep6
Three Masked Males. In Cleveland, Texas, a man guns down Conbino Crasto during a gas station robbery. CCTV sends police on a hunt for three masked suspects. S10, Ep1
Like A Brother To Me. When police find a man left for dead in his home, they look to security video to find his killer and follow clues to track down a suspicious SUV. S10, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Trails of Evidence. How a simple clue such as dirt on shoes can place a suspect at a crime scene. Meticulous forensic investigators follow the trails of evidence leading to killers. S5, Ep2
Flames of Justice. Find out how arson investigators can retrieve important clues from scorched rubble, leading to the arsonist. S4, Ep13
Radical Resistance. The bureau investigates the activities of a Croatian terrorist group who gunned down some of their opponents and eliminated others with parcel bombs. S6, Ep16
Operation Goldenrod. In Beirut armed extremists seize a plane and terrorise everyone on board. The CIA undertakes a daring operation to stop the hijackers; but will they succeed? S6, Ep18
Paul, Dawn And Samantha. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the murder of three young children in 1973. Plus, a mother fights to change the law after her son is killed. S5, Ep5
Bound By Honor. A young woman has to hide her relationship from her orthodox father and protective brother. But, their heavenly relationship quickly becomes a hellish nightmare. S4, Ep10
Billy Smolinski: Favourite Son. Billy disappears just after finding out his girlfriend is cheating on him. Is she behind it, or will a perpetrator emerge from beyond the grave? S1, Ep5
All That It Seems. A traffic accident on the Interstate near Des Moines, Iowa, kills a young mother. Police use construction work cameras to piece together her final moments. S6, Ep9
Thief, Conwoman, Nurse Killer. Jeannie Miata was a nurse who killed a woman with a lethal dose of insulin. Experts analyse the actions and motive of this disturbing murderer. S2, Ep5
Broken Heart In Broken Arrow. Twenty-one-year-old mother, Lauren Kidd, always follows her heart. It leads her to happiness, but there's a darkness lurking that no one can stop. S7, Ep15
Put Yourself Out There. Randy Ferguson's life changes forever when he meets single mother, Angela Phillips. But the beautiful life they build together hides an ugly secret. S7, Ep20
The Move Out. Tempers flare outside a home where Savannah police officers have uncovered three dead bodies. One argument could offer a vital lead in this horrifying case. S4, Ep4
Nicola Fellows & Karen Hadaway. The murder of two children sparks a manhunt that spans three decades. Plus, the National Crime Agency attempts to thwart a gun smuggling operation. S5, Ep7
Good Samaritan. Student Kenia Monge disappears without a trace. The search hits dead ends until detectives uncover chilling surveillance footage, revealing what happened to her. S2, Ep4
Badge Of Evil. Tony believes his mother found happiness with Deputy Dave Rogers, until he sees the dark truth a man who uses his badge to terrorize and abuse. S10, Ep15
Son Of The Prophet. Reveals the devastating and often undiscussed consequences on the people who have nurtured, loved, and raised a killer. S2, Ep1
Paul, Dawn And Samantha. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the murder of three young children in 1973. Plus, a mother fights to change the law after her son is killed. S5, Ep5
The Sticky Tape Killer. When a woman's badly decomposed body is discovered in a suitcase in a small North Yorkshire village, detectives must figure out who she is and who killed her. S1, Ep7
The Confession. When a young mum goes missing in Ellesmere Port, the whole community searches for her. After a tip, Police locate the charred suitcase that holds her remains. S1, Ep8
Shattered Dreams. Reluctant witnesses force police to rely on CCTV after the murder of a father in a Baltimore, Maryland, in his own home. S10, Ep3
The Trophy Collector. In Baltimore, police turn to CCTV to hunt for a budding serial killer after two women are strangled to death in one week. S10, Ep4

In the Line of Fire. Investigates the tragic cases of innocent people ruthlessly killed by bombers, snipers and spree killers. S5, Ep4
For the Love of Money. The naked body of a Swedish man is found, a father and son are accused of killing a woman and a police officer impostor disposes of her love rival. S5, Ep5
Predator. When a little girl is abducted the FBI race to locate their prime suspect - a drifter on parole for kidnapping children - but will they find him before it's too late? S3, Ep6
The Price of Greed. Follows the FBI investigation into a robbery in which masked gunmen tied up employees at an armoured truck depot and left with $18.9 million. S5, Ep1
Nicola Fellows & Karen Hadaway. The murder of two children sparks a manhunt that spans three decades. Plus, the National Crime Agency attempts to thwart a gun smuggling operation. S5, Ep7
Mother Of All Lies. In 2015, detective Scott Sanderson uncovered a harrowing case involving a missing mother and her baby. The disturbing truth shatters everyone involved. S2, Ep3
The End Of Innocence. A young woman on the brink of starting her dream job disappears, and it's down to forensic officers to gather the clues that may lead to her whereabouts. S1, Ep8
The Vanishing Nurse. Nursing student Michelle Le vanishes without a trace. Police discover CCTV footage of her car driving around a parking lot, but who is the driver? S2, Ep3
Roger Dean set fire to a nursing home, murdering 11 people. Experts analyse the actions and motive of this twisted serial killer. S2, Ep6
I Had No Choice. For years, Bill, Stephanie, and their three kids hide their torment while struggling to keep up appearances. But in 2011, the façade shatters for good. S8, Ep2
Rescue Me. In Genoa, Ohio, John Eichner, his wife and kids look like a happy bunch, but behind closed doors a disturbing pattern of torment and gaslighting plays out for years. S8, Ep3
Kind Of A Vicious Person. An elderly Arizona couple's murder spurs a statewide hunt for the killer. The investigation culminates in an unexpected arrest. S4, Ep10
Joanna Yeates. British criminal barrister Robert Rinder examines the case of 25-year-old Joanna Yeates, who was found strangled to death on Christmas Day in 2010. S1, Ep3
Watching Dru. Student Dru Sjodin suddenly vanishes after her shift at Victoria's Secret. CCTV footage shows Dru's last movements revealing the chilling reason for her disappearance. S2, Ep5
Love, Lies, And Lust. In 2018, police search a backyard in Florida for a body after a once-idyllic marriage sours and turns vengeful, filled with lies and affairs. S9, Ep7
She Had No Name. A young woman vanishes into a patrol car. For 35 years, she's a Jane Doe, until hypnosis reveals a clue that unmasks a predator hiding in plain sight. S1, Ep4
Nicola Fellows & Karen Hadaway. The murder of two children sparks a manhunt that spans three decades. Plus, the National Crime Agency attempts to thwart a gun smuggling operation. S5, Ep7
